Professional Background

I'm a passionate Computer Science student at Federal University of Technology Minna with a strong foundation in web development, mobile app development, and graphic design. My journey in tech started early, and I've been continuously improving my skills through practical projects and real-world applications.

I believe in creating solutions that are not just functional but also beautiful and user-friendly. My diverse skill set allows me to handle projects from concept to deployment.
